response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional general software engineering expertise across multiple domains with 16+ years of experience, they lack critical required qualifications for this specialized role. Notably absent: native-level Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement), deep C programming and embedded systems expertise, and specialized knowledge in security technologies (encryption, 802.1X, MACsec) and embedded networking protocols. The candidate's background is primarily in web, mobile, and application development rather than embedded firmware and LAN-switch products.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (16+ years) with demonstrated mastery in testing, CI/CD, and code quality practices
Proven ability to quickly master new technical domains and languages across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong mentoring and teaching background with experience organizing workshops and leading teams at staff level
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency (a stated requirement for the role)
Limited deep C programming expertise and no demonstrated embedded firmware or LAN-switch product experience
No background in security technologies (encryption, 802.1X, MACsec) or embedded networking protocols (Layer 2/3, SNMP, NETCONF)

key_factors.factor: Embedded systems and C programming specialization
Security and embedded networking domain knowledge
